seo_title: AI Gender Swap — See Yourself as a Different Gender | LazyKiwi
seo_description: Try the AI gender swap filter with LazyKiwi. Upload one photo and see a realistic male or female version of yourself in seconds — a fun, shareable face transformation.

hero.title: Meet the other version of you.
hero.description: Upload one photo and see a realistic male or female version of yourself. The AI reimagines features, hair and styling while keeping it recognizably you.

what_it_is.title: A believable what-if, not a cartoon.
what_it_is.intro: The LazyKiwi gender swap filter reimagines your face as another gender — adjusting features, hairstyle and styling while keeping your core likeness. It’s a lighthearted way to see a realistic alternate version of yourself and share it with friends.

steps.title: Upload your photo
steps.description: A clear, well-lit photo is all you need. Your photo, your starting point.

steps.title: Pick a direction
steps.description: Let the AI choose, or note a male or female version in the prompt.

steps.title: Generate & download
steps.description: Preview the result, try a few more, then download your favourite.

features.title: A natural transformation, not a filter
features.description: Facial structure, hair and styling are reimagined so the result looks like a real person — your alternate self.

features.title: Your likeness, reimagined
features.description: The swap preserves the essence of your face, so it feels like meeting a sibling you never had.

features.title: A before-and-after people stop for
features.description: Create a clean reveal that’s perfect for TikTok, Reels and group chats — no editing needed.

showcase.title: One face, two versions
showcase.subtitle: See a realistic male or female take on your own photo.

cards.title: Seconds, not days
cards.description: Results render almost instantly, so you can compare options before your coffee's cold.

cards.title: Private by default
cards.description: Your photos are processed securely and never sold. What you upload stays yours.

cards.title: Free to start
cards.description: No credit card to try. Get a real result on your own photo at zero cost.

cards.title: No regret
cards.description: Test the change risk-free and decide with your own eyes.

cards.title: Made for you
cards.description: Tuned for natural, believable results — not a filter slapped on top.

cards.title: No skills needed
cards.description: No Photoshop, no prompts to master. Upload, tap, done.

quotes.quote: I was nervous to try this, saw it on my own photo in seconds, and I'm obsessed. So much easier than guessing.
quotes.name: Mia R.

quotes.quote: Showed the LazyKiwi preview instead of trying to describe what I wanted. First time I got exactly what I pictured.
quotes.name: Daniel K.

quotes.quote: My before/after post blew up — it looks real because the swap actually fits. Total game changer.
quotes.name: Priya S.

faqs.question: Is the gender swap filter free?
faqs.answer: Yes. Upload a photo and generate a gender-swapped version for free.

faqs.question: Will it still look like me?
faqs.answer: Yes. The AI reimagines features and styling while keeping your core likeness, so it reads as a believable alternate you.

faqs.question: What photo works best?
faqs.answer: A clear, front-facing selfie with even lighting and your full face visible.

faqs.question: Can I choose male or female?
faqs.answer: Yes. Let the AI decide or specify the direction in the prompt box.

cta.title: See the other you in one tap.
cta.description: Upload a photo and let LazyKiwi reveal a realistic male or female version of yourself to share.
